_comment: Recorded per-token pricing for providers the harness can score cost against. Per the z.ai/GLM addendum hard rule #1, every entry cites a sourceUrl and dateChecked — do not hardcode a price from memory, re-verify against the live docs before trusting it.

zai-glm.cachedInputNote: limited availability; harness uses the uncached input price by default

gemini.cachedInputNote: context caching tier; harness uses the uncached input price by default
